title: wiggly axolotls tails (like tadpoles) Fresh Animations addon
description: divides the tail by 2 on axolotls (fresh animations addon
body:
required: **[optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**

a [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) addon that divides axolotl tails by 2 parts like tadpoles.

it is fully compatible with resource packs that changes textures
